issues.description: Condition missing: must check 'opponent has 3 or more Life cards' — condition should be a Life count check (not 'Always')
Action type incorrect: 'RemoveLife' removes opponent's life total; effect requires 'ForceDiscard' to trash from opponent's Life deck (top card)
Second effect is completely unrelated to card text — no mention of playing Yellow Characters with cost ≤3 in official effect
